questions.objective_ref: Define what a word embedding is and explain why plain text cannot be fed directly into an AI model.
Explain why one-hot encoding fails to capture meaning and how embeddings fix that problem.
Describe how a word embedding places related words close together in vector space.
Identify at least two real-world AI systems that rely on word embeddings.
Interpret a small embedding space by reading off which words are neighbours and what that neighbourhood implies about meaning.
